email_body.description: Optional email body text. Providing it allows the agent to align subject line tone and content with the email's core message.

prospect_name.description: Prospect's first name (or full name). Used for personalization variants.

company_name.description: Prospect's company name. Used for company-personalized variants.

hook_or_trigger.description: Optional specific trigger to reference (e.g. 'Series B funding', 'hired new CMO', '6 open SRE roles'). Enables trigger-based subject line patterns.

count.description: Number of subject line variants to generate.
